schema.name: TZPID source truth generated from canonical equation master

identity.canonical_title: NODAL MASS OPERATOR Canonical Statutory Formula: M I

theory.canonical_statement: [ID 1021] NODAL MASS OPERATOR Canonical Statutory Formula: $\hat{M} i = \int {\Omega_i} \rho_{vac} \cdot R_i(t) \cdot \det(J_p) dV$ Formal Technical Dissertation: Formalizes mass as an "Inertial Shadow" resulting from the interference of vacuum oscillators. Mass precipitates at nodes where phase coherence $R_i$ approaches unity and the Jacobian determinant vanishes. Source: [31]
theory.technical_interpretation: NODAL MASS OPERATOR Canonical Statutory Formula: M I is an expectation / trace over state, written M i = ∫ Ω_i ρ_vac · R_i(t) · det(J_p) dV. It is computed as an expectation value or trace over a quantum state, producing an observable. It is built from v, a, c, R_i, J_p, V, defining M i. Within the Trawin Zero Point registry it serves as one element of the framework's mathematical narrative.

formation.inputs: v, a, c, R_i, J_p, V
